name: Ramen Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the cabbage into small pieces and add the sliced green onion to the cabbage.
2. Toast sesame seeds and almonds on a cookie sheet in the oven. Be careful, as they burn very quickly.
3. Crush the Ramen noodles (Original Flavor) in their package. Open the broth package separately.
4. Just before serving, add the crushed (uncooked) noodles, toasted sesame seeds, and sliced almonds to the cabbage mixture.
5. Dressing: Use a Good Seasons salad dressing bottle. Add water, oil, and vinegar according to the bottle's instructions. Add 1 package of Ramen seasoning and 1 tbsp sugar. Shake well.
6. Toss everything together just before serving. This dish is wonderful and was a hit at my Christmas dinner, even for those who didn't usually enjoy cabbage or slaw.
Thank you Tom Hammond for providing this great recipe.
